Simple Psych

A diagnosis directory for psychiatry with profile pages that surface explicit DSM criteria, concise DSM-context summaries, validated scales, treatment sections, and linked management literature.

16 diagnoses

  • Alcohol Use Disorder Substance-Related and Addictive Disorders
  • Anorexia Nervosa Feeding and Eating Disorders
  • Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder Neurodevelopmental Disorders
  • Autism Spectrum Disorder Neurodevelopmental Disorders
  • Binge-Eating Disorder Feeding and Eating Disorders
  • Bipolar I Disorder Bipolar and Related Disorders
  • Bipolar II Disorder Bipolar and Related Disorders
  • Borderline Personality Disorder Personality Disorders
  • Bulimia Nervosa Feeding and Eating Disorders
  • Generalized Anxiety Disorder Anxiety Disorders
  • Major Depressive Disorder Depressive Disorders
  • Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder Obsessive-Compulsive and Related Disorders
  • Panic Disorder Anxiety Disorders
  • Posttraumatic Stress Disorder Trauma- and Stressor-Related Disorders
  • Schizophrenia Schizophrenia Spectrum and Other Psychotic Disorders
  • Social Anxiety Disorder Anxiety Disorders

Diagnosis Profiles

Select a diagnosis.

Each profile includes explicit DSM-style criteria, a five-bullet DSM summary, validated scales, FDA-approved treatment sections, and key management literature.
